query: How many days can employees work remotely and at what intervals are performance reviews conducted?
reference: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. Performance reviews are conducted twice per year in June and December.

query: What is the company's policy on remote work?
reference: Employees may work remotely up to 3 days per week with manager approval. A dedicated workspace with reliable internet (minimum 25 Mbps) is required. The company provides a one-time $500 stipend for home office setup.

Passwords must be minimum 12 characters with uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters. Passwords expire every 90 days. MFA is required for all employees. Accounts lock after 5 consecutive failed login attempts.

query: What is the expense reimbursement policy?
reference: Business expenses must be submitted within 30 days of incurrence. Receipts are required for all expenses over $25. Pre-approved limits include meals during business travel at $75 per day, client entertainment at $200 per event with manager approval, and professional development at $2,000 per year per employee.

query: What was the Q4 2024 total revenue and how did it compare to Q3?
reference: Q4 2024 total revenue was $48.7M, up 12% from Q3 2024 revenue of $43.5M.

query: What file types does DataSync support and what is the maximum file size?
reference: DataSync supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, TXT, CSV, JSON, and XML file types. The maximum file size is 5 GB per file.

query: What is the status of the Q4 report?
reference: The Q4 report (quarterly_report_q4_2024.md) has been approved. It was submitted by Sarah Chen from the Finance department.
The file product_faq.txt is currently pending. It was submitted by Emily Rodriguez from the Product department.

query: Is the Q4 report approved? What was the total revenue?
reference: Yes, the Q4 report is approved. It was submitted by Sarah Chen from Finance. The Q4 2024 total revenue was $48.7M.

query: What is the status of the engineering onboarding guide and what does it say about first-week expectations?
reference: The engineering onboarding guide (engineering_onboarding_guide.md) is currently processing. It was submitted by Dr. Sarah Zhang from the Engineering department.

query: What is the company's policy on stock options?
How does DataSync handle permissions and what integrations are available?
reference: DataSync uses Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) with four permission levels: Owner, Admin, Editor, and Viewer. Available integrations include Slack, Jira, Microsoft Teams, Google Workspace, and Zapier.

query: What should I do if I suspect a security incident?
reference: Report suspected security incidents to the Security Operations Center (SOC) at soc@techcorp.com within 15 minutes. Do not delete any evidence or logs related to the incident.

query: Which files were rejected and who submitted them?
reference: The file q1_2025_budget_proposal.pdf was rejected. It was submitted by Michael Tanaka from the Finance department.

query: What is the uptime SLA for DataSync Enterprise?
reference: DataSync Enterprise plan guarantees 99.95% uptime SLA.

query: How many new enterprise customers were signed in Q4 and what was the largest contract?
reference: 3 new enterprise customers were signed in Q4 2024. The largest contract was with Meridian Healthcare at $420K annual value.

query: Can personal devices access source code repositories?
reference: Personal devices are NOT permitted to access source code repositories under the BYOD policy.
